{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322071031B763D9D900BB26E1E5AF"}"},"total":239},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7543694327410639640","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"从视频推荐而来，一晚上看完，剧情问题不大，挺有意思的，作者加油别断更。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1756412514,"group_id":"7532111597884427289","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/HGfdQ8a1TPcIVMxbAHDjQ/3wrh24IcEWyJTcDGYAx4","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702960&x-signature=tRnwf4v8J2ikrGzX%2B9K6cLn0GrM%3D","user_id":"3606813800923870","user_name":"海渃沄汐"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3606813800923870","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7532111597884427289","book_info":{"abstract":"【轻松，非无敌，悟性逆天，多女主，修罗场，慢节奏，介意慎入】
　　莫语穿书虐文世界，不仅拥有逆天悟性，还选择了美好人生系统。
　　可是，正当他打算安心当个路人，无忧无虑畅享修仙生活的之时。
　　原剧情中那几位天命之女却一个个追着他不放。
　　清冷孤高的绝世剑仙，“莫语，你究竟如何才肯拜我为师？”
　　古灵精怪的萝莉公主，“莫语，莫语，你跟我去妖族当妖皇好不好嘛~”
　　娇艳欲滴的妖媚圣女，“莫郎，只要你愿与我同去，便是将来的在世魔君！”
　　莫语迷茫了。
　　你们一个个的追我干什么？
　　不该去跑剧情么？
　　……
　　直到无数年后，莫语手握人、妖、魔三族帝印，将天命之女亚于...下：
　　“老实交代，当初是谁让你们追着我的？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/36ad8aef91334bc2654203881a140126","author":"南方小木","author_id":"","book_id":"7532111597884427289","book_name":"天命女主别追了，再追真成主角了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#c03028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9746人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7532118782681039385","read_count":"9746","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"526098"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.4","serial_count":"239","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,多女主,穿书,搞笑轻松","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/3a923b54e8727fb967a6bafa5a221c7b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779318631&x-signature=Z2TFp7fW%2FvqY5xeiL2CfMeeQEbI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"111427475410","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"77"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322071031B763D9D900BB26E1E5AF"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读9小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":13,"forwarded_count":0,"list
